title: Pancreator stage output
description: The machine contract a worker submits for a stage. The harness validates this shape and the stage's required_data before accepting it. Operator-readable narrative belongs in the referenced HTML brief and its JSON source, not here.

$operator.description: Optional operator-first header: headline, status, next_action.

invocation_id.description: Must equal the active invocation's id.

result.description: The worker's own outcome. blocked pauses the run.

summary.description: Concise, operator-first summary. Not a place for raw logs.

artifacts.description: Durable deliverables produced by this stage. Artifact 0 is the rendered HTML operator brief and artifact 1 is its JSON source; additional evidence follows.

path.description: Repository-relative path inside the project root.

criteria.description: Self-evaluation of every declared stage criterion.

result.description: A hard criterion may not be not_applicable.

evidence.description: Paths or observations a reviewer could re-check. Prefix intended path references with `path:`; ordinary slash-bearing prose and pytest node IDs are observations.

risks.description: Residual risks; empty means checked, not skipped.

unknowns.description: Open questions the operator should know about.

data.description: Stage-specific structured fields. Must satisfy the stage's required_data shape.

workspace_changes.description: Optional attribution for tracked workspace changes observed during this stage. The cleanliness gate blocks external or unattributed contamination, not changes traced to the active worker.
